skills.label: Electronic equipment repair

skills.label: Manual materials handling
skills.description: Move, load, and manage physical materials safely

skills.label: Electrical wiring
skills.description: Install and connect electrical wiring in buildings and equipment

skills.label: Teaching and instruction

skills.label: Basic patient care
